dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9741 IH: To name the District of Columbia tuition assistance grant program the “Eleanor Holmes Norton District of Columbia Tuition Assistance Grant Program”.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Garcia of California introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

form.official-title: To name the District of Columbia tuition assistance grant program the Eleanor Holmes Norton District of Columbia Tuition Assistance Grant Program.

section.header: Name of District of Columbia tuition assistance grant program
section.text: The District of Columbia tuition assistance grant program established by the District of Columbia College Access Act of 1999 (sec. 38–2701 et seq., D.C. Official Code) shall on and after the date of the enactment of this Act be known and designated as the Eleanor Holmes Norton District of Columbia Tuition Assistance Grant Program. Any reference to the District of Columbia tuition assistance grant program in any law, regulation, document, record, or other paper of the United States shall be considered to be a reference to the Eleanor Holmes Norton District of Columbia Tuition Assistance Grant Program.
